title: TurboDOMBuilder
description: An in-development frontend TypeScript library that incorporates HCI concepts such as instruments and substrates, and introduces an MVC-inspired architecture that provides varying levels of structure, while still maintaining flexibilitiy.

title: eave - The New Shopping Experience
description: Created a 3D virtual and collaborative shopping environment in Unity. Designed and implemented the environmental (3D) and information-related (2D) interactions.

title: Child Bullying Visualization
description: Designed and developed with a partner an interactive visualization that depicts the percentage of bullied kids in Argentina in 2018 based on different physical and social characteristics.

title: Invisible Haunted Mansion
description: An immersive ghost-hunting game created in a group project and designed to be non-visual and leverage other senses. The player catches ghosts in their physical room using their smartphone/wearable device with auditory and haptic feedback.

title: Upool Carpooling System
description: Designed and user-tested a transportation solution for university students in Lebanon based on user interviews.

title: 3D Animations
description: Two 3D animation I created completely from scratch. The first one was created to an audio taken from CNN’s Colorscope series.
